name: content_reporting_actions_block_menu
title: Shared Kitchen Guide | Test Host Community

callouts.title: Each reportable block can surface its own feedback area
bullets: The shared block wrapper keeps feedback attached to the exact section a person wants reviewed.
Host apps can still add their own block controls through the existing extra-block-components seam without replacing the shared CE structure.
The same surface can later grow into contribution actions such as correction requests or translation suggestions.
